category: DINO Expert (moved up from Sport mid-2026) - and NICA Varsity (per family)
confidence_note: High confidence from official RunSignUp result data. Paul raced Sport at Winona (May 16), then moved up to EXPERT at Muscatatuck (Jul 12, 9th of 23 men). Times are NOT comparable across venues (courses differ) - within-race gaps are the reliable signal. NICA Varsity could not be verified online (the NICA results host was blocked).
garmin_flag: Confirmed: at Muscatatuck he raced EXPERT (9th), not Sport - his ~2:18 Garmin ride there matches the Expert race. He was not in the Brown County or Potato Creek finish lists (skipped or DNF).

chase.name: Camron Coddington
chase.detail: 16, Indianapolis - THE rival. Same age, races Expert every round, consistently just ahead. Muscatatuck: 8th, +1:41 on Paul. This is the wheel to fight for all season.

chase.name: Richard Mezo
chase.detail: 49, Crown Point. 7th at Muscatatuck (+5:50), podium-capable masters rider - a realistic next target once he holds Coddington.

chase.name: Ethan Blackburn
chase.detail: 45, Louisville KY. 6th at Muscatatuck - the front of the Expert mid-pack.

peers.name: Jackson Strutz
peers.detail: 17, Carmel. Dead-even - finished 0.01 sec behind Paul at Muscatatuck (10th). Also moved up from Sport. His best training match: push each other on hard days.

peers.name: Curtis Deroos
peers.detail: 47, Winona Lake. 11th at Muscatatuck, +2s on Paul - part of the tight cluster right around him.

peers.name: Ryan Yoder
peers.detail: 37, Nashville. 12th at Muscatatuck, +14s - another close, regular Expert racer.

aspirational.name: Gunner Dygert
aspirational.detail: 31, Brownsburg. Won Muscatatuck (1:59:31) and Potato Creek - the man to beat in Expert.

aspirational.name: Ethan Jedlicka
aspirational.detail: 26, Indianapolis. Won Winona, 2nd Muscatatuck - perennial front-runner.

aspirational.name: Ralph Nurse
aspirational.detail: 49, Valparaiso. Elite masters - 5th Muscatatuck, top-of-field consistency.

upcoming: Entry lists for Southwestway Park (Aug 16, DINO) and the Stoney Run NICA opener (Aug 29-30) are not public - both behind logins. Camron Coddington and Jackson Strutz race most DINO rounds, so expect both at Southwestway. Check start lists race week.
nica: Paul races NICA VARSITY (per family) - the top high-school ability tier, so his NICA rivals are the strongest juniors in Indiana. Could not verify online: the NICA results host (results.bikereg.com) was blocked. To pull Varsity rivals, open the Indiana league's results on results.bikereg.com or indianamtb.org from a logged-in browser.
